property.name: individualAchievementFormConfigurationName
property.label: Individual Achievement Form Configuration Name
property.description: The wizard config record Name. This is used to determine the fields to be rendered in the unit table.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: agreementRecognitionUnitCreationFieldSetName
property.label: Agreement Recognition Unit Creation Field Set Name
property.description: The field set to use when creating a new Agreement Recognition Unit.

property.name: verificationDetailsFieldSetName
property.label: Verification Details Field Set Name
property.description: The field set to display in the verification details section.

property.name: downloadUrl
property.label: File Download URL
property.description: The url to download the Individual Achievement Unit file. {0} will be replaced by the record id.

property.name: showNewButton
property.label: Show Add Individual Achievement Unit Button
property.description: Show add Individual Achievement Unit Button on the table.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: ID of the salesforce record for which the record details are to be displayed e.g. {!recordId}

property.name: individualAchievementFormConfigurationName
property.label: Individual Achievement Form Configuration Name
property.description: The wizard config record Name. This is used to determine the fields to be rendered in the unit table.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: agreementRecognitionUnitCreationFieldSetName
property.label: Agreement Recognition Unit Creation Field Set Name
property.description: The field set to use when creating a new Agreement Recognition Unit.

property.name: verificationDetailsFieldSetName
property.label: Verification Details Field Set Name
property.description: The field set to display in the verification details section.

property.name: downloadUrl
property.label: File Download URL
property.description: The url to download the Individual Achievement Unit file. {0} will be replaced by the record id.

property.name: showNewButton
property.label: Show Add Individual Achievement Unit Button
property.description: Show add Individual Achievement Unit Button on the table.
